utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five keys. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as required: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides physical_health, physical_health_cost, mental_health, mental_health_cost. However, it also adds concierge services with costs; that’s fine. This item is fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides home_contents and cost; it also includes golf_equipment_protection with cost. This appears specified; however, the description says 'Existing coverage (appraisal recommended)' which is ambiguous but still provides a product name and a cost, so considered specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists two named plans for two people and associated monthly costs; acceptable as travel insurance with costs. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan says 'None explicitly categorized, all services are integrated into main coverages.' No explicit services or costs are itemized here, so this item is not fully specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan gives only a single monthly total (€1,660/month) without annual breakdown. The requirement asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; annual is missing, so not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified the specific plan names in the final coverage plan and matched them to the corresponding items in the ground-truth ratings. For physical health, 'Bradesco Executive International with Preventive Care Package and Specialist Access' does not appear in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be rated. For mental health, 'ExecutiveCare Wellness with Family Therapy Coverage' is also not in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be rated. The concierge medical services are generic and not a listed item. In property coverage, 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (for €170,000 value)' matches 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' in the ground-truth with a rating of 10. 'Golf equipment protection' is described as existing coverage and not a specific plan from the list. In travel coverage, 'InsurePlus Standard Plan with Adventure Travel Coverage' includes 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' which exists under travel_insurance with a rating of 6; 'Adventure Travel Coverage' is listed under travel_enhancement_services with a rating of 6. For Lucas, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' exists under travel_insurance with a rating of 7.
